productDisplayName: Gini and jony Boys Printed Red T-shirt
description: Composition Red T-shirt made of 100% cotton, has a ribbed round neckline with tape detailing on the inseam, short sleeves, graphic print on the front and brand tab attached to the left hem on the front Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash in cold water with like colours and mild detergent Wash/dry inside out Do not tumble dry Use warm iron; Do not iron on decoration Remove all detatchable accessories before washing Get your little one ready for the outdoors with this red T-shirt from Gini and jony. The graphic lettering of the words 'Boston Academy' and the brand name gives this tee a dose of brand appeal. Team it with jeans and comfy footwear for a happy, casual outing with his pals, while the pure cotton fabric stays soft on the skin and keeps him fresh and comfortable all day.
